drivers.notes: Active Ridge Technology (ART) surround, PPA lens

description.en: Slim three-way 4-driver tower in Paradigm's Premier line — 25 mm X-PAL dome tweeter on top, dedicated 140 mm midrange and two 140 mm woofers, all sharing the carbon-infused polypropylene cone with Active Ridge Technology surround. Crossovers at 800 Hz and 2.5 kHz; 33 Hz DIN extension and 88 dB anechoic sensitivity in a narrow 215 mm-wide footprint.
description.es: Torre slim de tres vías y 4 drivers en la línea Premier de Paradigm — tweeter X-PAL de domo de 25 mm arriba, midrange dedicado de 140 mm y dos woofers de 140 mm, todos compartiendo el cono carbon-infused polypropylene con suspensión Active Ridge Technology. Crossovers a 800 Hz y 2.5 kHz; extensión a 33 Hz (DIN) y 88 dB anechoic en un footprint angosto de 215 mm.
